titleStmt.title: SII 8.708: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 708. (A.R. No. 392 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu 3vatu ḷ meṣanāyaṟṟu tiyati Irupatta
ñcā nāḷ taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟapuliyūr peruṅkavici
yaṉ tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉ Iraviyum Ivaṉe mu
tukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi Am
pavattamutu kottalarkuḻaliyum Iva
ṉe mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivar makaṉi
ravi tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉum
peruṅkavuciyaṉ yiravi tirunaṭṭamāṭiyai
mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi Aṉa
nticuraṉ kiḻakkaṭaiyaniṉṟāḷum peruṅ
kaviciyaṉ yiravi Ampalattamutai mutukaṇṇāka
Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi tirukkaḻippālai
uṭaiyāḷ civakāmacuntariyum peruṅka
mulattāṉamuṭaiyāṉum vācciyaṉviṉāyaka
mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ mātā tirukkaḻip
�ṉ tattaiyum Ivaṉe mutukaṇṇāka Uṭai
ṇi tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉ koṇṭā
vom kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
kku kireyaccelavu kuṭuttaparicāvatu . nāṅkaḷ Ivaṉukku I
ṟṟaināḷāl liṟṟukuṭutta cātaṉa Olaippaṭi nilam Iraṇ
ṭe Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭumāviṉ ciṉṉamum
viṟṟukuṭutta Olaippaṭi kācu Āṟāyirat taññūṟṟum koṇ
ṭom koṇṭaparicāvatu . Eṅkaḷil vācciyaṉ viṉāyakaṉ ca
pāpatiyai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pattā tirukkaḻippālai
uṭaiyāṉ tattai śrītaṉam peṟṟuṭaiya piriti nirnilam Oru
māvarai Itil Ivaḷuṭaiya nilam Orumāvukku kācu 6 100 Ikkācu Aṟu
nūṟum Ivaṉ kaikkoṇṭum Ivaṉ marumakaṉ koṇṭā
ṉ Eḻutiuṭaiya Olaippaṭi nilam Araimāvukku kaikkoṇṭa kā
cu [3 100 Āka] viḷainilam Orumāvaraikkum kaikkoṇṭa
kācu toḷāyiramum nikki nikki nāṅkaḷ Uṭaiya viḷainila
mum kollaiyum Uḷppaṭa nilam Oṉṟemukkāle nāṉku
māvarai Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭu māviṉ ciṉṉat
tukku kaikkoṇṭa kācu Aiyyāyirat taṟunūṟum Uṭai
yar Uṭaiyapaṭi yaṟakkoṇṭum Āka kācu Āṟāyirat taññū
ṟum Ipparicināle yaṟakkoṇṭu kireyaccilavu kuṭutto
m Inta kavuciyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku muṟkuṟi
tta Ivvaṉaivom . Ipparicu yivvaṉaivarum Eḻutuka yeṉṟu
yum viṟṟukakuṭuttu koṇṭom vilaippo
ruḷ yaṉṟāṭu cellu naṟkācu 6 1000 5 100 Ikkācu Āṟāyirat taññū
ṟum Uṭaiyom Uṭaiyapaṭi kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccela Aṟa
kkoṇṭu muṟkuṟittapaṭiye Inta nīu
� kīi � Innilam Iraṇ
ṭe Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭumā
viṉ ciṉṉattaiyum Iṉnāyaṟṟu tiyati
patiṉmuṉṟiṉāl nilam viṟṟu vilaittaravu
Eḻutik kuṭuttu Iṟṟaināḷāl vilai
ppiramāṇatiṭṭu kuṭuttom Intaka
vuciyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
ṉukku muṟkuṟitta Ivvaṉaivom . Iṉnilat
tukku Ikkācu Āṟāyirat taññūṟume vi
laiyāvutākavum . poruḷmāvaṟutip po
ruṭ cilaolaiyum Ituveyāvatākavum . yi
tu Allatu veṟu porumāvaṟutip poruṭcilaolai kā
ṭṭakaṭavatallatākavum . Iṉnilattukku paḻampaṭi pā
yu nir pāyavum vārinir vāravum Iṟaikkunir yiṟaikka
vum peṟuvatākavum . Iṉnilattukku yaṉṉi Uṭaiyār
nila niṉṟu Iṉnir Uṟap pāyavum vāravum Uṭai
ya vākkālum yiṉnilattukku vanta taṭaiyum yiṭai
yūṟun tīttu Āḻvippataṟ keṅkaḷ vāḻve yāṭci yi
ṟaippiṇai yāvutākavum . Ippaṭi cammatittu muṟkuṟitta kā
cu Āṟāyirat taññūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariye Uṭaiyom
Uṭaiyapaṭi k Aiyyile yaṟakkoṇṭu muṟkuṟittapa
ṭikaḷāl vaṉta nilam Iraṇṭe Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye
Iraṇṭumāviṉ ciṉṉattaiyum viṟṟu vilaittaravu
Eḻutikkuṭuttu Iṟṟaināḷāl vilaippiramāṇattiṭ
ṭu yeḻutikkuṭuttom Inta kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟa
mpalamuṭaiyāṉukku peruṅkaviciyaṉ tirukkaḻippā
lai Uṭaiyāṉ Iraviyum Ivaṉe mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Iva
ṉ pirāmaṇi Ampalattamutu kottalarkuḻaliyum Ivaṉe mu
tukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivar makaṉ yiravi tirukkaḻippālaiuṭai
yāṉum peruṅkavuciyaṉ yiravi tirunaṭṭa māṭiyai mutuka
ṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivar pirāmaṇi Aṉanticuraṉ kiḻakkaṭaiyaniṉ
ṟāḷum peruṅkaviciyaṉ yiravi Ampalattamutai mutukaṇṇāka
Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi tirukkaḻipālaiuṭaiyāṉ civakāma
cuntariyum peruṅkavuciyaṉ Iravi śrī mulattāṉamuṭaiyāṉuA few other signatures are wanting to complete this record.
Digital edition of SII 8.708 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
